github_repos.title: redis/redis
github_repos.snippet: For developers, who are building real-time data-driven applications, Redis is the preferred, fastest, and most feature-rich cache, data structure server, and document and vector query engine.

arxiv_papers.title: Optimizing Reinforcement Learning Training over Digital Twin Enabled Multi-fidelity Networks
arxiv_papers.snippet: In this paper, we investigate a novel digital network twin (DNT) assisted deep learning (DL) model training framework. arxiv_papers.title: A Lightweight Digital-Twin-Based Framework for Edge-Assisted Vehicle Tracking and Collision Prediction
arxiv_papers.snippet: Vehicle tracking, motion estimation, and collision prediction are fundamental components of traffic safety and management in Intelligent Transportation Systems (ITS).
